subject: Disable homing_solution
commit_message:
Disable homing_solution

Send Homing_solution=none during macro instantiation
Add flag 'FLAG_DISABLE_HOMING' (by default set to true) which defines
whether homing_solution should be in request to so or not

Issue-ID: VID-576
Signed-off-by: wsliwka <wojciech.sliwka@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I6151151a0256a5bb4e637acf08ae511f4b265dc2
Signed-off-by: wsliwka <wojciech.sliwka@nokia.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Absolutely needed for LAB testing use-cases in ONAP.
With this functionality, we can easily turn off homing, when testing in lab environments. This will greatly simplify using VID in demonstrations and for PoCs.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vid-master-verify-java/1365/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vid-master-verify-java/1365

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> Absolutely needed for LAB testing use-cases in ONAP.
> With this functionality, we can easily turn off homing, when testing in lab environments. This will greatly simplify using VID in demonstrations and for PoCs.

Is it a temporary addition? If yes, we can add a test that fails if flag exists after a certain date.

Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Build Failed

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
 > >
 > > Absolutely needed for LAB testing use-cases in ONAP.
 > > With this functionality, we can easily turn off homing, when
 > testing in lab environments. This will greatly simplify using VID
 > in demonstrations and for PoCs.
 > 
 > Is it a temporary addition? If yes, we can add a test that fails if
 > flag exists after a certain date.

I don`t think, it will be temporary.
Generally, using Homing Solution makes sense for macro flows in production. On the other hand, in PoC/Demo/Integration environments, most of the users turn Homing off, to simplify the ONAP environment.

This is already happening e.g. in Scale-out demos - see here:
https://docs.onap.org/en/dublin/submodules/integration.git/docs/docs_scaleout.html?highlight=Scale-out#part-2-scale-out-use-case-instantiation 

"userParams": [
      {
        "Homing_Solution": "none"
      }

I think, this shall be a flag, that a user could switch, when running a lab/PoC/Demo/Integration environment, to simplify his/her environment. Good candidate to have it in K8S Helm chart for VID.

> I don`t think, it will be temporary.

> This is already happening e.g. in Scale-out demos - see here:

So, will it never be resolved in SO's config?

If not temporary, I suppose should be a configuration.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

> > Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
 > >
 > > > > Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
 > >  > >
 > >  > > Absolutely needed for LAB testing use-cases in ONAP.
 > >  > > With this functionality, we can easily turn off homing, when
 > >  > testing in lab environments. This will greatly simplify using
 > VID
 > >  > in demonstrations and for PoCs.
 > >  >
 > >  > Is it a temporary addition? If yes, we can add a test that
 > fails if
 > >  > flag exists after a certain date.
 > >
 > > I don`t think, it will be temporary.
 > > Generally, using Homing Solution makes sense for macro flows in
 > production. On the other hand, in PoC/Demo/Integration
 > environments, most of the users turn Homing off, to simplify the
 > ONAP environment.
 > >
 > > This is already happening e.g. in Scale-out demos - see here:
 > > https://docs.onap.org/en/dublin/submodules/integration.git/docs/docs_scaleout.html?highlight=Scale-out#part-2-scale-out-use-case-instantiation
 > >
 > > "userParams": [
 > >       {
 > >         "Homing_Solution": "none"
 > >       }
 > >
 > > I think, this shall be a flag, that a user could switch, when
 > running a lab/PoC/Demo/Integration environment, to simplify his/her
 > environment. Good candidate to have it in K8S Helm chart for VID.
 > 
 > So, will it never be resolved in SO's config?
 > 
 > If not temporary, I suppose should be a configuration.

Well, after looking at the SO BBs, it makes sense in general to have Homing enabled for macro flows. We changed the default in SO from Sniro (not available in ONAP) to OOF/HAS. This shall become a configuration in the future in SO. 

Actually, a larger re-factoring shall happen there - and the SO API shall actually allow to select "use homing"/"don`t use homing" - and not really which homing solution shall be used. (assumption each deployment will use only 1 homing solution - but potentially different for different deployments).

Now still, in many environments, we`d like to (on purpose) turn any homing solution off - and in that case SO uses it`s default OpenStack settings provided in the SO helm chart (alternatively Multi-VIM serving as translator - and not an optimization solution).
With this simplification it is easier to run many use-cases.

Based on - I think, it would make sense to have this parameter as a VID config in Helm chart - and for environments, where we are runing tests, dmeos and integrations, we set this parameter to send Homing_solution: None.
